channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Freddie Freeman’s World Series Game 1 walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: It’s the third-most expensive baseball ever sold, behind Shohei Ohtani’s $4.4M 50/50 home run ball and Mark McGwire’s 70th home run ball, which sold for roughly $3M in 1999.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Mavericks, Warriors combine for NBA-record 48 3-pointers in Dallas' 143-133 victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Dallas Mavericks and Golden State Warriors combined for an NBA-record 48 3-pointers Sunday night. Golden State hit 27 and Dallas made 21 in the Mavericks' 143-133 victory at Chase Center.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jordan Love throws for 2 TDs and Packers beat Seahawks 30-13 as Seattle QB Geno Smith injures knee
item.description: Jordan Love threw two touchdown passes to Romeo Doubs and the Green Bay Packers ended Seattle’s four-game winning streak with a 30-13 victory over the Seahawks, who lost quarterback Geno Smith to a knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Josh Allen has another huge game to lift Bills to a 48-42 victory that snaps Lions' winning streak
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Josh Allen took a shotgun snap, moved up in the pocket and backed up, rolled left and threw right. It was just another play, a 28-yard pass to James Cook, in the latest sensational performance by the potential NFL MVP.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saquon Barkley slowed by 'minor' injury, loses ground in pursuit of Dickerson's record
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Eagles running back Saquon Barkley had a setback in his chase of the NFL season rushing record when he appeared slowed by an undisclosed injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants owner John Mara gets another aerial message trashing his team before loss to Ravens
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — New York Giants co-owner John Mara received another aerial message trashing his woeful team before Sunday's 35-14 loss to the Baltimore Ravens.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Miami receiver Grant DuBose was hospitalized in stable condition and undergoing further evaluation after being taken off the field on a stretcher following a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man United secures stunning late 2-1 comeback win against Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Amad Diallo struck a 90th-minute winner as Manchester United staged a stunning late comeback to beat Manchester City 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday. Four-time defending champion City led the Manchester derby 1-0 going into the 88th minute at the Etihad Stadium.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge Judy joins superfan Jim Harbaugh as Chargers honorary captain vs. Buccaneers
item.description: Judge Judy Sheindlin will serve as an honorary team captain for the Los Angeles Chargers in their Week 15 matchup against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pep Guardiola says 'I'm not good enough' after latest Man City loss
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Pep Guardiola declared himself “not good enough” after Manchester City's season sunk to a new low after a 2-1 defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: LAGUNA NIGUEL, Calif. (AP) — Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction. The bidding at SCP Auctions went into the late hours of Saturday night, according to a statement from the auction house on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lessons learned: Mater Dei coach finally beats De La Salle
item.description: Mater Dei coach Raul Lara sheds light on what he learned more than two decades after De La Salle beat his Long Beach Poly teams in back-to-back years.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU gets defensive against Wyoming in 68-49 win
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mawot Mag and Dawson Baker came off the bench and combined for 22 points, sparking BYU men’s basketball to 68-49 win over Wyoming on Saturday night at the Delta Center. "It was a good win," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: AP Pro Football Writer (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sixers standout rookie Jared McCain is out indefinitely with a torn meniscus that requires surgery
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers rookie Jared McCain has a meniscus tear in his left knee that requires surgery and is expected to be out indefinitely.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UK hockey team retires Adam Johnson's No. 47 to honor player who died after neck cut
item.description:
Adam Johnson made as big an impression off the ice as he did on it for the Nottingham Panthers.
The U.K. hockey team officially retired Johnson's No. 47 jersey on Saturday in tribute to the American forward who died after his neck was cut by an opponent’s skate during a game over a year ago.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take on the Devils after Bertuzzi's 2-goal showing
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (9-18-2, in the Central Division) vs. New Jersey Devils (19-10-3, in the Metropolitan Division) Newark, New Jersey; Saturday, 1 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays and catcher Danny Jansen finalize $8.5 million, 1-year contract
item.description: Veteran catcher Danny Jansen and the Tampa Bay Rays have finalized an $8.5 million, one-year contract. The deal includes a $12 million mutual option for 2026 with a $500,000 buyout. Jansen, who turns 30 in April, hit .
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah shuts down Colorado for fifth straight road victory
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is turning into a team of road warriors. Dylan Guenther scored two goals and an assist to give him a team-leading 12 goals on the season, while Karel Vejmelka made 22 saves, as Utah shut down the Colorado Avalanche Thursday night, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 1 school board gives necessary approval on Arlington Park property tax deal with Bears; 2 more to go
item.description: PALATINE, Ill. — The Bears have moved one step closer to a property tax agreement on the 326-acre site of the former Arlington International Racecourse in northwest suburban Arlington Heights.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Hall has goal and assist, Soderblom stops 29 shots as Blackhawks beat Rangers 2-1
item.description: Taylor Hall had a goal and an assist, Arvid Soderblom stopped 29 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the New York Rangers 2-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
